C

close() - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Closes the Adventure audiences to prevent memory leaks.
ConfigUpdaterUtils - Class in dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils
A robust YAML configuration updater.
CustomConfig - Class in dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config
Modern wrapper for Bukkit's YamlConfiguration.
CustomConfig(Plugin, String) - Constructor for class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.CustomConfig
Creates or loads a custom YAML configuration file in the main plugin folder.
CustomConfig(Plugin, String, String) - Constructor for class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.CustomConfig
Creates or loads a custom YAML configuration file in a specific subfolder.

Formats a raw string into an Adventure Component.

G

getAdventure() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Gets the Adventure Audiences manager for dispatching MiniMessage components.
getBoolean(CommandSender, String, boolean) - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Retrieves a boolean value from the locale file safely.
getConfig() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.CustomConfig
Gets the loaded configuration instance.
getDefaultPrefix() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Gets the default prefix used as a safe fallback if missing from the config.
getFallbackLanguage() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Gets the default fallback language used when a player's locale is not found.
getFloat(CommandSender, String, float) - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Retrieves a float value from the locale file safely.
getInstance() - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Gets the global NukeLexicon instance.
getInt(CommandSender, String, int) - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Retrieves an integer value from the locale file safely.
getLanguageManager() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Gets the language manager handling locales and translation files.
getPlugin() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Gets the Bukkit Plugin instance hosting this library.
getRawMessage(CommandSender, String) - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Retrieves the raw string from the correct YAML file, based on the player's client language.
getRawMessageList(CommandSender, String) - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Retrieves a list of raw strings from the correct YAML file, based on the player's client language.
getTranslationComponent(CommandSender, String) - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils.SendUtils
Retrieves a translated string and parses it directly into a Kyori Adventure Component.
getTranslationComponent(CommandSender, String, TagResolver) - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils.SendUtils
Retrieves a translated string and parses it directly into a Kyori Adventure Component with custom tags.

init(Plugin) - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Initializes the NukeLexicon library with automatic metadata detection.
init(Plugin, String, String) - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
Initializes the NukeLexicon library.

L

LanguageConfigManager - Class in dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config
Manages the Per-Player Multi-Language (i18n) system.
LanguageConfigManager(Plugin) - Constructor for class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Initializes the LanguageConfigManager and loads all available locales.
loadLocales() - Method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
Loads and updates all language files from the locales/ folder.

Logs a formatted message directly to the server console.
log(String, TagResolver) - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils.SendUtils
Shorthand to send a formatted message directly to the server console.

Sends a translated Title and Subtitle to a specific player.

Sends a translated Title and Subtitle to a specific player with custom tags.

Translates and sends a single message to a CommandSender based on their client language.
sendTranslation(CommandSender, String, TagResolver) - Static method in class dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils.SendUtils
Translates and sends a single message to a CommandSender based on their client language.

Translates and sends a list of messages to a CommandSender based on their client language.

U
